Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller

Class PlacementController

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
public final class PlacementController extends Object
Drives the ship-placement phase of a match on a single Board / BoardGridView pair.

Implements the rubric's "select and move" mechanic (point 4): the player either

  1. clicks a not-yet-used entry on the ShipTrayView to pick up a brand-new ship, or
  2. clicks an already-placed ship directly on the board to pick it back up,
and in both cases the ship then follows the mouse conceptually (previewed with a green/red cell highlight) until the player clicks a destination cell to drop it there. Pressing R rotates the ship currently held; ESC cancels the hold and returns a picked-up ship to its previous spot.

This class is built and wired programmatically by GameController once the board/tray views exist; it is deliberately independent of FXML so it can be unit-tested without a loaded scene.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private final class 
    PlacementController.CellClickAdapter
    Reacts to a click on a board cell: either picks up a placed ship, or drops the held one.
    private final class 
    PlacementController.CellHoverAdapter
    Tracks which cell the mouse is over so rotation (R) can refresh the right preview.
    private final class 
    PlacementController.PlacementKeyAdapter
    Rotates or cancels the ship currently held, via the keyboard.
    private static final class 
    PlacementController.Selection
    Immutable-enough record of what is currently "in hand" while placing.
    private final class 
    PlacementController.TraySelectAdapter
    Reacts to a click on one of the ten tray entries: picks up that ship type.

    selection
    Currently held ship, or null if nothing is selected.

    trayEntries
    Flattened tray entries, in the same order as ShipType.values() with repeats.

    usedTrayEntries
    Tray entries that have already been dropped onto the board.

    • projectFootprint

      private List<Coordinate> projectFootprint(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
      Projects the cells a ship would occupy from head without touching the board model — used purely for preview/flash rendering. Mirrors Board's own (private) projection logic.
      Returns:
      The projected cells, or null if any of them would fall off the board.
